scaffoldCommand.signature: handleScaffold(cwd: string, options?: { projectType?: string }): Promise<ScaffoldReport>
scaffoldCommand.description: /scaffold command: analyzes project type and generates appropriate foundation layer

scaffoldTemplates.description: Project-type-specific foundation templates (webapp, API, library, CLI)

initInfrastructure.signature: Project type detection from init-time context analysis
initInfrastructure.description: Leverages project type detected during /init to determine which scaffold to generate

commitsToMain.description: Scaffold output must commit to main branch before any set branches are created

reRunnable.description: Running /scaffold again must not destroy existing customizations -- additive only or skip existing files

roadmapperAware.description: Roadmapper agent must incorporate scaffold existence when planning set boundaries
